smoke.detail: pixi run pytest tests/test_gpu.py -q: 18 passed (fully mocked, no real GPU)

note: core/gpu.py: pure parse_nvidia_smi(text) -> {index: used_MiB}, query_used_mib() shells out fresh (never caches free, per the GPU-0 landmine), FREE_THRESHOLD_MIB=15. Soft locks at config.locks/gpu{N}.lock (pid + ISO UTC ts) via O_EXCL acquire/release + claim() context manager that releases on exception; stale locks (>12h TTL) read as unlocked and are reclaimed, no process is killed. pick_free_gpu() returns lowest index free by nvidia-smi AND unlocked, else None; caller sets CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES in the job's own ssh connection. locks dir injectable via config for hermetic tests.
